positive: A whimsical scene of woodland creatures: a sleepy fox curled up next to a glowing toadstool, a tiny owl perched on a fern, and a gentle deer drinking from a mossy stream. Style: Cottagecore, Studio Ghibli aesthetic, detailed watercolor painting, soft pastel palette, dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy, volumetric lighting, highly intricate, magical realism, maximalist composition, 8k, trending on ArtStation, depth of field, ethereal, inviting, natural light.
